title: Rich Brazilian Cassava Paçoça
description: A rich, fluffy and show-off Brazilian dessert featuring double cream and cassava flour. This vegetarian-friendly treat is perfect for special occasions.
instructions: Preheat the steamer basket and boil the water in a large pot.
Sift the cassava flour into a large mixing bowl and add the granulated sugar.
In a separate bowl, cream the unsalted butter and eggs together until light and fluffy.
Add the double cream to the butter and egg mixture and mix until well combined.
Add the sifted cassava flour mixture to the wet ingredients and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for about 5 minutes until it becomes elastic and shiny.
Wrap the dough in a clean cloth and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Steam the dough in the preheated steamer basket for 30-40 minutes, or until it is cooked through and fluffy.
Remove the steamed dough from the cloth and let it cool for a few minutes.
Dust the cooled dough with confectioners' sugar and serve.
Optional: if using fresh cassava tuber, peel and grate it and mix it into the dough before steaming.
Optional: drizzle with melted butter and sprinkle with cinnamon powder before serving.
